name: logo
title: Logo
description: Renders text as ASCII art using figlet fonts. Includes a standalone getFigletText utility for non-JSX usage.

registry/ui/logo/index.ts.raw:
export { Logo, type LogoProps } from "./logo";
export { getFigletText, type FigletFont } from "./get-figlet-text";

docs.description: Renders text as ASCII art using figlet fonts. Includes a standalone getFigletText utility for non-JSX usage.

notes.title: Font Loading
notes.content: Fonts are parsed eagerly on first import. The bundled fonts (Big and Small) are imported statically, so no network requests are made.

notes.title: Sizing
notes.content: Figlet output can be large. Use small text sizes (text-[6px] to text-[10px]) and responsive sizing to fit it in your layout.
